omitted_declarations.policy_reference: We use analytics services (including, but not limited to, Google Analytics) to help us understand how our Services are used. Analytics service providers, may use cookies and other technologies to collect information about your use of the Services and other websites.

We use analytics services (including, but not limited to, Google Analytics) to help us understand how our Services are used. Analytics service providers, may use cookies and other technologies to collect information about your use of the Services and other websites.

We may share your information with third parties (including our group companies and third party service providers) to help us process your information and to provide, analyse, and improve the Service. This includes, for example, analysing data to better understand our users’ needs, drawing insights to help us improve the Service, and for crash reporting.

We may share your information with third parties (including our group companies and third party service providers) to help us process your information and to provide, analyse, and improve the Service. This includes, for example, analysing data to better understand our users’ needs, drawing insights to help us improve the Service, and for crash reporting.

We may also share certain information such as cookie data with third-party advertising partners. This information would allow third-party ad networks to, among other things, deliver targeted advertisements that they believe will be of most interest to you.

We may share your personal information with our trusted third party partners for their own marketing purposes. We will only do this where you have given us your consent to do so. These third parties may include: Social media platforms such as Facebook, TikTok, Snapchat and Twitter to provide you with interest-based advertising on those platforms. Third party advertisers and advertising networks such as Google, to provide you with interest-based advertising.
